channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: The Siren Song of Shares: A Vybz Kartel Kenya Concert Scam
item.dc:creator: The Chronicler
item.description: A familiar echo across centuries, from London's Exchange Alley to Kampala's hopeful streets, whispers of an alleged Vybz Kartel Nairobi May 2026 tour, reminding
item.content:encoded: A familiar echo across centuries, from London's Exchange Alley to Kampala's hopeful streets, whispers of an alleged Vybz Kartel Nairobi May 2026 tour, reminding

item.title: Claims of a Sifuna-Maraga-Gachagua 2027 Presidential Ticket Are False
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: Claims of a 2027 presidential ticket featuring Edwin Sifuna, David Maraga, or Rigathi Gachagua are false, serving only as satire amid shifting coalitions.
item.content:encoded: Claims of a 2027 presidential ticket featuring Edwin Sifuna, David Maraga, or Rigathi Gachagua are false, serving only as satire amid shifting coalitions.

item.title: Kenya reports decline in national cybersecurity threats
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: National cybersecurity officials report a significant drop in threat events as system infrastructure remains the primary target for attackers.
item.content:encoded: National cybersecurity officials report a significant drop in threat events as system infrastructure remains the primary target for attackers.

item.title: Bayern Munich vs PSG Champions League Semi-final Second Leg
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Bayern Munich hosts Paris Saint-Germain at Allianz Arena trailing 4-5 on aggregate, fighting for a spot in the final against Arsenal.
item.content:encoded: Bayern Munich hosts Paris Saint-Germain at Allianz Arena trailing 4-5 on aggregate, fighting for a spot in the final against Arsenal.

item.title: Autopsy confirms Reverend Julius Ndumia died from head injuries
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: A post-mortem examination reveals Reverend Julius Ndumia died from blunt force trauma and asphyxiation at his Nakuru home as police investigations grow.
item.content:encoded: A post-mortem examination reveals Reverend Julius Ndumia died from blunt force trauma and asphyxiation at his Nakuru home as police investigations grow.

item.title: Karen Nyamu admits to miraa use while pushing for legislative reform
item.dc:creator: Martin Kihara
item.description: Senator Karen Nyamu has admitted to personal miraa use while advocating for the declassification of the crop to boost trade and industry in Kenya.
item.content:encoded: Senator Karen Nyamu has admitted to personal miraa use while advocating for the declassification of the crop to boost trade and industry in Kenya.

item.title: Kenya Relaxes Fuel Sulphur Standards Amid Supply Chain Concerns
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: The Kenyan government has temporarily lowered fuel sulphur standards for six months, sparking health and environmental concerns across Nairobi.
item.content:encoded: The Kenyan government has temporarily lowered fuel sulphur standards for six months, sparking health and environmental concerns across Nairobi.

item.title: Sting Reaffirms Decision Not to Leave Inheritance to His Children
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Musician Sting has confirmed his long-standing policy of not leaving his fortune to his children to ensure they develop a strong personal work ethic.
item.content:encoded: Musician Sting has confirmed his long-standing policy of not leaving his fortune to his children to ensure they develop a strong personal work ethic.

item.title: One Night Only Festival Returns to Sarit Expo Centre
item.dc:creator: Martin Kihara
item.description: The One Night Only festival returns to the Sarit Expo Centre with a multi-genre music showcase featuring Alikiba, Bien, and international stars.
item.content:encoded: The One Night Only festival returns to the Sarit Expo Centre with a multi-genre music showcase featuring Alikiba, Bien, and international stars.

item.title: Azeezah Hashim Disputes Age Claims Amid Online Controversy
item.dc:creator: Martin Kihara
item.description: Citizen TV presenter Azeezah Hashim has publicly refuted claims that she is 27 years old, asserting she is 19 based on her mother's confirmation.
item.content:encoded: Citizen TV presenter Azeezah Hashim has publicly refuted claims that she is 27 years old, asserting she is 19 based on her mother's confirmation.

item.title: Senator Richard Onyonka Confirms Roselyn Akombe Is His Wife
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: Kisii Senator Richard Onyonka has officially confirmed that former IEBC Commissioner Roselyn Akombe is his wife, ending months of public speculation.
item.content:encoded: Kisii Senator Richard Onyonka has officially confirmed that former IEBC Commissioner Roselyn Akombe is his wife, ending months of public speculation.

item.title: Former Lands Minister Amos Kimunya Acquitted in Land Fraud Case
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The court has acquitted former minister Amos Kimunya of corruption charges after a decade-long legal battle regarding land allocation in Nyandarua.
item.content:encoded: The court has acquitted former minister Amos Kimunya of corruption charges after a decade-long legal battle regarding land allocation in Nyandarua.

item.title: CNN founder and media pioneer Ted Turner dies at 87
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: Ted Turner, the visionary who launched the 24-hour news cycle and reshaped the global cable landscape, has passed away at the age of 87.
item.content:encoded: Ted Turner, the visionary who launched the 24-hour news cycle and reshaped the global cable landscape, has passed away at the age of 87.

item.title: Former Lands Minister Amos Kimunya Acquitted in Land Corruption Case
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Magistrate Harrison Barasa has acquitted former Lands Minister Amos Kimunya of corruption charges, ending a decade-long legal battle over public land.
item.content:encoded: Magistrate Harrison Barasa has acquitted former Lands Minister Amos Kimunya of corruption charges, ending a decade-long legal battle over public land.

item.title: Justice Mohamed Abdullahi Warsame Appointed to Supreme Court
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: President William Ruto has appointed Justice Mohamed Abdullahi Warsame to the Supreme Court, making him the first judge from Northern Kenya to join the bench.
item.content:encoded: President William Ruto has appointed Justice Mohamed Abdullahi Warsame to the Supreme Court, making him the first judge from Northern Kenya to join the bench.

item.title: Real Madrid fans sign petition to force out Kylian Mbappe
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Real Madrid supporters have launched a massive petition demanding Kylian Mbappe exit the club following a disappointing season and team friction.
item.content:encoded: Real Madrid supporters have launched a massive petition demanding Kylian Mbappe exit the club following a disappointing season and team friction.

item.title: Njugush Sparks Public Interest Following New Creative Partnership
item.dc:creator: Wanjiku Kuria
item.description: Comedian Timothy Kimani continues to draw public attention after partnering with Bilgal Wambui following his separation from Celestine Ndinda.
item.content:encoded: Comedian Timothy Kimani continues to draw public attention after partnering with Bilgal Wambui following his separation from Celestine Ndinda.

item.title: Kenya Trade Deficit Widens as Import Costs Outpace Export Revenue
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Kenya faces a growing trade deficit as import costs reached KSh 3.063 trillion, driven by heavy reliance on Asian markets despite export shifts.
item.content:encoded: Kenya faces a growing trade deficit as import costs reached KSh 3.063 trillion, driven by heavy reliance on Asian markets despite export shifts.

item.title: Big Brother Naija Season 11 Production Officially Underway
item.dc:creator: Amara Ndlovu
item.description: MultiChoice has confirmed that production for the eleventh season of Big Brother Naija has started, following the record success of season ten.
item.content:encoded: MultiChoice has confirmed that production for the eleventh season of Big Brother Naija has started, following the record success of season ten.

item.title: FX Confirms The Bear to End With Fifth Season
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: FX has officially announced that the critically acclaimed series The Bear will conclude after its upcoming fifth season of eight episodes.
item.content:encoded: FX has officially announced that the critically acclaimed series The Bear will conclude after its upcoming fifth season of eight episodes.

item.title: President Ruto Appoints Justice Warsame to Supreme Court
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: President William Ruto has appointed Justice Mohamed Abdullahi Warsame to the Supreme Court as Kenya nominates Njoki Ndung'u for an ICC judgeship.
item.content:encoded: President William Ruto has appointed Justice Mohamed Abdullahi Warsame to the Supreme Court as Kenya nominates Njoki Ndung'u for an ICC judgeship.

item.title: Kenya Relaxes Fuel Sulphur Standards Amid Supply Chain Disruptions
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: Kenya has temporarily relaxed sulphur content standards for diesel and petrol to address fuel shortages caused by global supply chain issues.
item.content:encoded: Kenya has temporarily relaxed sulphur content standards for diesel and petrol to address fuel shortages caused by global supply chain issues.

item.title: President Ruto Appoints Justice Mohamed Warsame to Supreme Court
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: President William Ruto has appointed Justice Mohamed Abdullahi Warsame to the Supreme Court while backing Justice Njoki Ndung'u for an ICC position.
item.content:encoded: President William Ruto has appointed Justice Mohamed Abdullahi Warsame to the Supreme Court while backing Justice Njoki Ndung'u for an ICC position.

item.title: Mental Health Overtakes Cancer as Global Top Health Concern
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: Global public perception marks mental health as the leading health issue today. Experts urge Kenyan firms to prioritize workplace wellness now.
item.content:encoded: Global public perception marks mental health as the leading health issue today. Experts urge Kenyan firms to prioritize workplace wellness now.

item.title: Arsenal reach Champions League final amid celebration debate
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Arsenal qualified for the Champions League final after beating Atletico Madrid, sparking a fierce debate over their emotional post-match celebrations.
item.content:encoded: Arsenal qualified for the Champions League final after beating Atletico Madrid, sparking a fierce debate over their emotional post-match celebrations.

item.title: Vera Sidika Announces Plans to Resume Kenyatta University Studies
item.dc:creator: Wanjiku Kuria
item.description: Kenyan entrepreneur Vera Sidika reveals she is returning to Kenyatta University to complete her degree after pausing it for her career.
item.content:encoded: Kenyan entrepreneur Vera Sidika reveals she is returning to Kenyatta University to complete her degree after pausing it for her career.

item.title: Dangote Refinery Plans Kenyan Investment Vehicle for Upcoming IPO
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Dangote Industries is establishing a Kenyan investment vehicle to allow local and regional investors to participate in its upcoming petroleum refinery IPO.
item.content:encoded: Dangote Industries is establishing a Kenyan investment vehicle to allow local and regional investors to participate in its upcoming petroleum refinery IPO.

item.title: Humble Beginnings: Early Roles of Famous Hollywood Actors
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Discover the early onscreen debuts of world-renowned stars like Leonardo DiCaprio and Halle Berry before they became global household names.
item.content:encoded: Discover the early onscreen debuts of world-renowned stars like Leonardo DiCaprio and Halle Berry before they became global household names.

item.title: The Sultan's Unheard Dirge: Wakadinali Spotify Streaming Dominance Kenya
item.dc:creator: The Chronicler
item.description: The court chroniclers boasted of unparalleled might, unaware of the silent rot beneath the gilded throne, much like the buzz around Wakadinali new songs 2026 Ke
item.content:encoded: The court chroniclers boasted of unparalleled might, unaware of the silent rot beneath the gilded throne, much like the buzz around Wakadinali new songs 2026 Ke

item.title: Shri Krishana Overseas reports 59 percent drop in annual earnings
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Shri Krishana Overseas faces a sharp decline in profits driven by high debt costs and operational delays at its new Kisaju manufacturing facility.
item.content:encoded: Shri Krishana Overseas faces a sharp decline in profits driven by high debt costs and operational delays at its new Kisaju manufacturing facility.

item.title: Nigerian Breweries Launches Immersive Heineken House in Lagos
item.dc:creator: Amara Ndlovu
item.description: Nigerian Breweries Plc hosts a four-day immersive event in Lagos featuring live sports screenings, music performances, and comedy shows.
item.content:encoded: Nigerian Breweries Plc hosts a four-day immersive event in Lagos featuring live sports screenings, music performances, and comedy shows.

item.title: Jamie-Lynn Sigler details secret health struggle in new memoir
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Actress Jamie-Lynn Sigler reveals how she concealed a bladder accident during a high-profile date with the help of friend JoAnna Garcia Swisher.
item.content:encoded: Actress Jamie-Lynn Sigler reveals how she concealed a bladder accident during a high-profile date with the help of friend JoAnna Garcia Swisher.

item.title: CS Wandayi Explains Abandoning Changamwe Refinery for Tanga Project
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Energy CS Opiyo Wandayi has informed the Senate that the Changamwe oil refinery is unviable, shifting focus to a new regional facility in Tanga Tanzania.
item.content:encoded: Energy CS Opiyo Wandayi has informed the Senate that the Changamwe oil refinery is unviable, shifting focus to a new regional facility in Tanga Tanzania.

item.title: Social Media Overtakes Television as Primary News Source in Kenya
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: A new Media Council of Kenya survey reveals social media has surpassed television as the leading source of news, forcing a shift in media production.
item.content:encoded: A new Media Council of Kenya survey reveals social media has surpassed television as the leading source of news, forcing a shift in media production.

item.title: Arsenal fans praise tactical maturity after Champions League win
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Arsenal supporters laud the team following a Champions League victory over Atletico Madrid as focus shifts to upcoming matches in the league.
item.content:encoded: Arsenal supporters laud the team following a Champions League victory over Atletico Madrid as focus shifts to upcoming matches in the league.

item.title: Kamene Goro Clarifies Marriage Status Following Hospitalization
item.dc:creator: Wanjiku Kuria
item.description: Media personality Kamene Goro has confirmed she remains married to DJ Bonez after public concern regarding his absence during her medical treatment.
item.content:encoded: Media personality Kamene Goro has confirmed she remains married to DJ Bonez after public concern regarding his absence during her medical treatment.

item.title: Del Monte Kenya Highlights Economic and Environmental Impact
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Del Monte Kenya releases its 60-year report, detailing a 100 billion shilling contribution to the economy and key sustainable farming milestones.
item.content:encoded: Del Monte Kenya releases its 60-year report, detailing a 100 billion shilling contribution to the economy and key sustainable farming milestones.

item.title: Kristine Sutherland discusses challenges playing Joyce Summers
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Actress Kristine Sutherland reflects on the emotional difficulty of portraying Joyce Summers and narrative inconsistencies in Buffy the Vampire Slayer.
item.content:encoded: Actress Kristine Sutherland reflects on the emotional difficulty of portraying Joyce Summers and narrative inconsistencies in Buffy the Vampire Slayer.

item.title: Kenya Pharmacy and Poisons Board Drafts Rules for Medical AI Tools
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: The Pharmacy and Poisons Board is developing a regulatory framework for medical AI to ensure safety, data protection, and diagnostic accuracy in Kenya.
item.content:encoded: The Pharmacy and Poisons Board is developing a regulatory framework for medical AI to ensure safety, data protection, and diagnostic accuracy in Kenya.

item.title: NEMA shuts down Mlolongo factory over Nairobi River pollution
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: NEMA officials have closed a manufacturing plant in Mlolongo for dumping untreated chemical waste into Nairobi River, resulting in three arrests.
item.content:encoded: NEMA officials have closed a manufacturing plant in Mlolongo for dumping untreated chemical waste into Nairobi River, resulting in three arrests.

item.title: Why South Africa Must Address Its Xenophobia Crisis
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: Rising xenophobia in South Africa betrays the spirit of Pan-African solidarity that fueled the nation's fight against apartheid.
item.content:encoded: Rising xenophobia in South Africa betrays the spirit of Pan-African solidarity that fueled the nation's fight against apartheid.

item.title: Arsenal Reach Champions League Final After Beating Atletico Madrid
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Arsenal secured their place in the Champions League final with a narrow 1-0 victory over Atletico Madrid at the Emirates Stadium to win 2-1 on aggregate.
item.content:encoded: Arsenal secured their place in the Champions League final with a narrow 1-0 victory over Atletico Madrid at the Emirates Stadium to win 2-1 on aggregate.

item.title: Ministry of Education Plans Enrollment Expansion for Top Schools
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The Ministry of Education aims to expand top school capacity and support under-enrolled institutions while enforcing the Ksh53,000 secondary fee limit.
item.content:encoded: The Ministry of Education aims to expand top school capacity and support under-enrolled institutions while enforcing the Ksh53,000 secondary fee limit.

item.title: Why planned protests on June 25 threaten Kenya's economic stability
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: An analysis of the risks posed by the June 25 demonstrations, arguing for the use of constitutional channels to ensure national security and recovery.
item.content:encoded: An analysis of the risks posed by the June 25 demonstrations, arguing for the use of constitutional channels to ensure national security and recovery.

item.title: Arsenal Reach First Champions League Final in Two Decades
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Arsenal beat Atletico Madrid at Emirates Stadium to secure a final spot. Mikel Arteta leads his side to the tournament decider after 20 years.
item.content:encoded: Arsenal beat Atletico Madrid at Emirates Stadium to secure a final spot. Mikel Arteta leads his side to the tournament decider after 20 years.

item.title: Barack Obama and Stephen Colbert discuss presidential standards

item.content:encoded: Former President Barack Obama visited the Obama Presidential Center to speak with Stephen Colbert as CBS prepares to end The Late Show by 2026.

item.title: Kenya Ramps Up County Industrial Parks to Boost Local Processing

item.description: Kenya is transitioning its county-based industrial parks to operational status to support local agro-processing and drive economic growth.
item.content:encoded: Kenya is transitioning its county-based industrial parks to operational status to support local agro-processing and drive economic growth.

item.title: Felix Kosgey Mandates Ethical Leadership in Public Service Reform
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: Kenya is shifting public service management toward personal accountability and ethical leadership to replace traditional top-down administrative compliance.
item.content:encoded: Kenya is shifting public service management toward personal accountability and ethical leadership to replace traditional top-down administrative compliance.

item.title: Uhuru Kenyatta Calls Trust Key to Resolving African Conflicts
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka

item.content:encoded: Former President Uhuru Kenyatta argues that governance gaps and trust deficits are the main barriers to lasting peace and stability across Africa.

item.title: Afrobeats Evolution into a Multi-Billion Dollar Global Industry

item.content:encoded: The Afrobeats industry is now worth billions as streaming numbers soar and international investment floods the African creative market through major deals.

item.description: Surgical safety in Kenya requires a shift from individual autonomy to multidisciplinary review processes to reduce patient harm and improve outcomes.
item.content:encoded: Surgical safety in Kenya requires a shift from individual autonomy to multidisciplinary review processes to reduce patient harm and improve outcomes.

item.title: Government Increases Per-Learner School Capitation to Ksh 2,340
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The Ministry of Education has announced an increase in school capitation funding to Ksh 2,340 per learner starting in July following a presidential directive.
item.content:encoded: The Ministry of Education has announced an increase in school capitation funding to Ksh 2,340 per learner starting in July following a presidential directive.

item.content:encoded: The government is transforming public service culture by shifting from rigid hierarchies to a focus on ethical duty and employee well-being.

item.title: Kenyan SACCOs report asset growth despite rising payroll arrears
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Kenya SACCO sector assets reached KSh 1.076 trillion in 2024, but liquidity remains pressured by KSh 3.49 billion in unremitted public sector deductions.
item.content:encoded: Kenya SACCO sector assets reached KSh 1.076 trillion in 2024, but liquidity remains pressured by KSh 3.49 billion in unremitted public sector deductions.

item.title: Kenya Scales Up Climate Action and Ecological Conservation Efforts
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Mwaniki
item.description: Kenya partners with international stakeholders to expand renewable energy and ecological restoration projects to protect agriculture and public health.
item.content:encoded: Kenya partners with international stakeholders to expand renewable energy and ecological restoration projects to protect agriculture and public health.

item.title: Kenya Allocates Ksh 3.36 Billion for New SGR Coaches and Wheelsets
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The government has set aside Ksh 3.36 billion to acquire new SGR coaches and locomotive parts as part of a wider push to modernize Kenya railway services.
item.content:encoded: The government has set aside Ksh 3.36 billion to acquire new SGR coaches and locomotive parts as part of a wider push to modernize Kenya railway services.

item.title: US Radio Network Rebrands to Honor Iconic Sitcom WKRP in Cincinnati

item.content:encoded: Radio owner Jeff Ziesmann has rebranded his Ohio and Kentucky station network to honor the legacy of the hit 1970s television sitcom WKRP in Cincinnati.

item.title: Vivo V70 FE Launched in Kenya With 200MP Camera and 7000mAh Battery

item.content:encoded: Vivo has introduced the V70 FE in Kenya featuring a massive 7000mAh battery, a 200MP camera, and enhanced IP68 and IP69 water resistance.

item.title: Celebrities Shine at Met Gala With Fashion Is Art Theme
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Global stars showcased sculptural designs and couture craftsmanship at the 2026 Met Gala as the red carpet celebrated the intersection of art and style.
item.content:encoded: Global stars showcased sculptural designs and couture craftsmanship at the 2026 Met Gala as the red carpet celebrated the intersection of art and style.

item.title: Safaricom Projected to Hit Record Profits and Higher Dividends
item.dc:creator: Grace Mkamburi
item.description: Analysts forecast record financial growth for Safaricom in the upcoming results, driven by strong M-Pesa revenue and Ethiopian operations.
item.content:encoded: Analysts forecast record financial growth for Safaricom in the upcoming results, driven by strong M-Pesa revenue and Ethiopian operations.

item.title: Understanding the Requirement for Dual-Colored Number Plates in Kenya
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: NTSA requires white front and yellow rear number plates in Kenya to improve visibility and road safety. Learn about the standards and policy.
item.content:encoded: NTSA requires white front and yellow rear number plates in Kenya to improve visibility and road safety. Learn about the standards and policy.

item.title: Global Paralympic achievements and athlete profiles in focus
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Explore the latest in disability sports, covering wheelchair racing victories, swimming championships, and inspiring journeys of Paralympic athletes.
item.content:encoded: Explore the latest in disability sports, covering wheelchair racing victories, swimming championships, and inspiring journeys of Paralympic athletes.

item.title: KeNHA Reopens Iten-Kabarnet Road After Landslide Clearance
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The Kenya National Highways Authority has reopened the Iten-Kabarnet road to motorists following a week of closures caused by heavy rainfall and debris.
item.content:encoded: The Kenya National Highways Authority has reopened the Iten-Kabarnet road to motorists following a week of closures caused by heavy rainfall and debris.

item.title: Gloria Ntazola Sparks Debate Over Modern Marriage Timelines
item.dc:creator: Wanjiku Kuria
item.description: Content creator Gloria Ntazola has triggered a conversation about how societal pressure and rigid life timelines impact marital success in Kenya.
item.content:encoded: Content creator Gloria Ntazola has triggered a conversation about how societal pressure and rigid life timelines impact marital success in Kenya.

item.title: Wamezidi! Kenyans Slam 'Horizontal Engineering' Club Attire
item.dc:creator: Zed Mogaka
item.description: Kenya faces uproar over increasingly revealing club attire (May 2026). Debate questions if it's style or 'auditioning for horizontal engineering.'
item.content:encoded: Kenya faces uproar over increasingly revealing club attire (May 2026). Debate questions if it's style or 'auditioning for horizontal engineering.'

item.title: Kamene Goro Confirms Marriage Status Following Hospital Stay
item.dc:creator: Wanjiku Kuria
item.description: Media personality Kamene Goro has reaffirmed her marriage to DJ Bonez after addressing public speculation about his absence during her recent month-long hospitalization.
item.content:encoded: Media personality Kamene Goro has reaffirmed her marriage to DJ Bonez after addressing public speculation about his absence during her recent month-long hospitalization.

item.title: Entertainment Weekly unveils major television and film projects
item.dc:creator: Mutheu Ann
item.description: Entertainment Weekly has released its industry preview issue highlighting major television and film productions for the coming year.
item.content:encoded: Entertainment Weekly has released its industry preview issue highlighting major television and film productions for the coming year.

item.title: Raiders select Fernando Mendoza as Seahawks win Super Bowl 60
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders pick Fernando Mendoza first in the NFL draft while Seattle Seahawks win Super Bowl 60 and announce franchise for sale soon after.
item.content:encoded: Las Vegas Raiders pick Fernando Mendoza first in the NFL draft while Seattle Seahawks win Super Bowl 60 and announce franchise for sale soon after.

item.title: Public Service Commission Announces Over 400 Government Vacancies
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The Public Service Commission has opened applications for over 400 professional positions across Kenya. Submit your credentials by May 6, 2026.
item.content:encoded: The Public Service Commission has opened applications for over 400 professional positions across Kenya. Submit your credentials by May 6, 2026.

item.title: Lydia Wanjiru Unveils Results of Her Body Transformation

item.title: Zari Hassan Celebrates Son Quincy Tlale on 19th Birthday

item.title: Sueh Owino Embraces Sustainable Living in New Mud Home

item.title: KRA whistleblower tips recover KES 6.8 billion in taxes
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
item.description: KRA's iWhistle Platform Bolsters Tax Recovery with Digital Intelligence Kenya Revenue Authority's iWhistle portal successfully recovered KES 6.8 billion in taxes during the financial year ending June 2025. This 61% increase from the previous year highlights...
item.content:encoded: KRA's iWhistle Platform Bolsters Tax Recovery with Digital Intelligence Kenya Revenue Authority's iWhistle portal successfully recovered KES 6.8 billion in taxes during the financial year ending June 2025. This 61% increase from the previous year highlights...

item.title: DNA Testing Reveals British Twins Have Different Biological Fathers
item.dc:creator: Za Ndani
item.description: DNA testing reveals a rare case of heteropaternal superfecundation for British twins who discovered they share different fathers. See what happened
item.content:encoded: DNA testing reveals a rare case of heteropaternal superfecundation for British twins who discovered they share different fathers. See what happened

item.title: Urgent: Kenya Embassy Warning for SA Protests 2024
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Kenya's Diplomatic Imperative: Safeguarding Citizens Amidst South African Protests Kenya's High Commission in Pretoria has issued a critical advisory for its nationals in South Africa, urging vigilance amidst escalating xenophobic violence. This directive...

item.title: Babu Owino Admits He Should Be in Jail Over DJ Evolve Case

item.title: How Kenya's Passport Issuance Hits New Low Amid 50-Page Option Removal
